So we broke down generally like the process of writing an article in multiple steps.
And the reason it's called an agentic article generation pipeline is because it includes steps where the AI evaluates the output and then grades it and then improves it.
So prior to the agentic pipeline, we had a standard article generation pipeline that wouldn't include this step.
And I'm going to break it down like step by step.
So for this topic, for example, we start by entering the title of the keyword, we give it a target word count range.
And there's also a general assignment direction that we provide the AI.

just the outline.

If it's a how-to article, there's a different type of template.
If it's a comparison article, there's a different type of template.
So this allows us to follow like best...

Writing Practices right off the bat because AI, if you don't give it a good structure in the beginning, what we've noticed is that LLMs, their outlines can be a little bit all over the place and there might be overlaps between sections.
So we try to control this at the very beginning by providing different templates that it should follow with best practices.
And then after, then once we like refine the assignment direction, we might also, in the we might provide a rough outline of the, that we want the AI to follow.

runs a very in-depth process where it answers questions in order to collect information, to compile a very in-depth research document that it uses during the article generation process.
